title: dolicholus debilis
intro: Dolicholus debilis, also known as climbing kidney bean or sensitive plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dolicholus debilis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can help prevent infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and has also been used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-rheumatic properties.
